message:
feat(export): support loading conversations from indexed database with illustration

Add database-backed conversation loading for virtual paths (e.g., Cursor
composer sessions that don't exist as files on disk):

- role_to_export_string(): Convert MessageRole enum to export format
- conversation_view_to_raw_messages(): Transform indexed conversation
  view to raw JSON messages for export pipeline
- try_load_indexed_conversation_from_db(): Load conversation from SQLite
  database by path with proper message reconstruction
- try_load_indexed_conversation(): Convenience wrapper using default DB

Updates run_view(), run_export(), and run_export_html() to check indexed
database as fallback when file paths don't exist, enabling seamless
export of conversations that were indexed but whose source files are
virtual or transient.

Also adds project illustration asset and consolidates vector literal
formatting in two_tier_search tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
